content.Overview: The Meraki Go GX20 is a Security Gateway designed for small businesses. It provides stateful firewall, DHCP, and DNS-based security powered by Cisco Umbrella, all managed through the simple Meraki Go mobile app and web portal. Recommended for deployments with 50 clients or fewer.
Features: DNS-based security powered by Cisco Umbrella (additional subscription required)
Remote cloud management via mobile app and web portal

Specifications.Dimensions: 6.83 x 4.41 x 1.04 in (173.4 x 112 x 26.3 mm), excluding feet/mount

content.Usage: Designed for small businesses needing basic security gateway functionality. Ideal for offices with up to 50 clients requiring stateful firewall, DHCP, and optional DNS-layer threat protection via Cisco Umbrella.

Accessories.GA-PWR-50WAC: 50W Replacement Laptop Style Adapter for GX20

content.Overview: The Meraki Go GX50 is a Router Firewall Plus designed for small businesses needing more advanced connectivity. It adds Client VPN and Site-to-Site VPN (GX50 to GX50) on top of the GX20's security gateway features, with 500+ Mbps firewall throughput. Managed entirely through the Meraki Go mobile app.
Features: DNS-based security powered by Cisco Umbrella (additional subscription required)
Remote cloud management via mobile app and web portal

Specifications.Dimensions: 1.1 x 5.1 x 9.4 in (27 x 130 x 239 mm), excluding feet/mount

content.Usage: Ideal for small businesses needing VPN capabilities in addition to firewall. Supports client VPN for remote workers and site-to-site VPN between GX50 units for connecting multiple branch offices.

Accessories.GA-PWR-50WAC: 50W Replacement Laptop Style Adapter for GX50

content.Overview: The Cisco Meraki Go GR10 is a dual-radio, cloud-managed 2x2:2 802.11ac Wave 2 indoor access point with MU-MIMO support. Designed for basic, medium-density deployments, it delivers a maximum 1.04 Gbps aggregate frame rate with concurrent 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz radios. Provides enterprise-grade security with simple management via the Meraki Go mobile app — ideal for small business and home office.
Features: Up to 256 QAM on both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands
PMK and OKC for fast Layer 2 roaming
Remote cloud management via mobile app and web portal

Specifications.Antenna: Integrated omni-directional (5.6 dBi @ 2.4 GHz, 5.3 dBi @ 5 GHz)
Specifications.DC Connector: 1x DC power connector (5.5mm x 2.5mm, center positive)
Specifications.Dimensions: 7.95 x 5.55 x 1.02 in (202 x 141 x 26 mm), excluding feet/mount

content.Usage: Designed for small business and home office indoor Wi-Fi deployments. Best suited for basic to medium-density environments needing reliable dual-band 802.11ac Wave 2 connectivity with simple cloud management.
In_the_Box: GR10-HW: Meraki Go Indoor Access Point

content.Overview: The Cisco Meraki Go GR60 is a dual-radio, cloud-managed 2x2:2 802.11ac Wave 2 outdoor access point with MU-MIMO support. It shares the same radio specs as the GR10 but is built for outdoor deployment with an extended temperature range (-20°C to 55°C), making it suitable for outdoor patios, parking lots, and building exteriors.
Features: Up to 256 QAM on both 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands
PMK and OKC for fast Layer 2 roaming
Remote cloud management via mobile app and web portal

Specifications.Antenna: Integrated omni-directional (5.6 dBi @ 2.4 GHz, 5.3 dBi @ 5 GHz)
Specifications.DC Connector: 1x DC power connector (5.5mm x 2.5mm, center positive)
Specifications.Dimensions: 9.57 x 4.53 x 1.26 in (243 x 115 x 32 mm), excluding mount plate

content.Usage: Designed for outdoor Wi-Fi deployments in small business environments such as outdoor patios, parking areas, building exteriors, and warehouses. The extended temperature rating makes it suitable for hot and cold climates.
In_the_Box: GR60-HW: Meraki Go Outdoor Access Point

content.Overview: The Meraki Go GS110 is a family of cloud-managed network switches available in 8, 24, and 48-port configurations with optional PoE. Designed for small businesses, they require no technical expertise to set up (under 10 minutes), include no licensing fees, and are managed remotely via the Meraki Go mobile app and web portal.
Features: Easy setup in under 10 minutes without technical expertise
PoE models eliminate need for separate power adapters for connected devices
Remote port management — view, enable, or disable ports remotely
Bulk port settings for time and cost savings
Connectivity status and power consumption visible per port
Remote cloud management via mobile app and web portal
Built-in free customer support (email and in-app)
Fanless operation on GS110-8, GS110-24, GS110-48 models
content.Usage: Ideal for small businesses needing affordable, easy-to-manage network switches. The 8-port model suits small offices; 24 and 48-port models for larger offices or retail. PoE models power access points, IP cameras, and phones without separate adapters.

Accessories.GA-MNT-MID-1: Mid Mount for GS110-48 and GS110-48P
